WARFRAMEMOD-DEATH_MARK_OF_CORPUS.title: Death Mark
WARFRAMEMOD-DEATH_MARK_OF_CORPUS.pages.I:
[sine][blue]"Thank you for your continued interest in the Zanuka Project. A member of our staff will assist you shortly..."[/blue][/sin]You heard an electronic sound.
[purple]A figure[/purple] is rapidly approaching from a distance.
WARFRAMEMOD-DEATH_MARK_OF_CORPUS.pages.R:
You ran away desperately, but you couldn't escape this [purple]four legged creature[/purple]. 
[jitter]It pounced[/jitter] and you lost consciousness. 
After waking up, you realize that you have lost something.
WARFRAMEMOD-DEATH_MARK_OF_GRINEER.title: Death Mark
[jitter][red]"You continue to assist our enemies. Your meddling will NOT be tolerated."[/red][/jitter]You heard a roar.
[green]Three figures[/green] are rapidly approaching from a distance.
You ran away desperately, but they still caught up with you.	They [jitter]forcibly placed[/jitter] [green]a strange object[/green] on you. You feel powerless all over.
WARFRAMEMOD-HELMINTH.title: Helminth
WARFRAMEMOD-HELMINTH.pages.INITIAL.descr:
A large distended mass quivers and makes strange noises. You carefully identify its words.
[jitter]"I can secrete Infusions that will make you stronger, more versatile... but to do this, you must feed me... will you feed me?"[/jitter]
WARFRAMEMOD-HELMINTH.pages.INITIAL.optio: [gold]Transform[/gold] a Common card in your [gold]Deck[/gold] into [gold]{CommonCardName}[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] a Uncommon card in your [gold]Deck[/gold] into [gold]{UncommonCardName}[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] a Rare card in your [gold]Deck[/gold] into [gold]{RareCardName}[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-HELMINTH.loss: "Sacs, stomachs, bladders - all full. I grow torpid."
WARFRAMEMOD-KUBROW_DEN.title: Kubrow Den
WARFRAMEMOD-KUBROW_DEN.pages.INITIAL.des:
After a combat, you discover that a wild beast's den nearby has been destroyed by your attack.
A [gold]single unguarded egg[/gold] lies abandoned there.
WARFRAMEMOD-KUBROW_DEN.pages.EAT.descrip:
You crack the egg open and gobble it up.
As a lunch, you have eaten worse than this.
WARFRAMEMOD-KUBROW_DEN.pages.TAKE.descri: You gently scoop up the egg and stow it, thinking it may [green]hatch[/green] into something useful later.
WARFRAMEMOD-MAROOS_BAZAAR.title: Maroo's Bazaar
You find yourself standing in the center of a [gold]stunningly large marketplace[/gold]. [purple]Various vendors[/purple] [sine]shuttle around you[/sine], with calculations hidden in their eyes, but their mouths are filled with enthusiasm - each one wants to get something from you, this new face. Soon, two of them block your way.
The one on the left leans in mysteriously, opens his palm, and reveals [orange]small round objects that look like nuts[/orange]. He lowers his voice and confidently declars that there are [sine][gold]once-in-a-lifetime treasures[/gold][/sine] sealed inside.
The one on the right claps his chest and tells you that if you buy his [blue]Aya[/blue], you can get [jitter]anything you want[/jitter] in this market.
WARFRAMEMOD-MAROOS_BAZAAR.pages.TOOK_A_R: He happily takes your gold and hands you [orange]one of the nuts[/orange].
WARFRAMEMOD-MAROOS_BAZAAR.pages.YOU_ARE_: He [jitter]impatiently grabs your gold and stuffs a blue droplet shaped object[/blue] into your hand. When you come to your senses, you realize that he has disappeared without a trace.
WARFRAMEMOD-OROKIN_VAULT.title: Orokin Vault
WARFRAMEMOD-OROKIN_VAULT.pages.INITIAL.d: In a corner of a hallway, a [gold]shimmering golden arch[/gold] emits a faint light. It seems that there are some valuable artifacts inside.
WARFRAMEMOD-OROKIN_VAULT.pages.INITIAL.o: [gold]Enchant[/gold] a Skill that does not [gold]Exhaust[/gold] with [purple]Narrow Minded[/purple].
WARFRAMEMOD-OROKIN_VAULT.pages.CORRUPTED:
You manage to open the door. There is a treasure in the treasury that [gold]emits a golden light[/gold], you try to touch it. 
You feel that it has exerted some special influence on you.
WARFRAMEMOD-OROKIN_VAULT.pages.LEAVE.des: You feel that there is an [purple]indescribable curse[/purple] in this door. You decide to leave.
WARFRAMEMOD-RIVEN_MAKER.title: Riven Maker
WARFRAMEMOD-RIVEN_MAKER.pages.INITIAL.de:
A masked woman appeared before your eyes.
[sine]"I am Palladino, Holy speaker of the [red]Red Veil[/red], like my mother, and hers before..."[/sine]
You cannot understand her words, but your attention is drawn to a few [sine][purple]strange purple cards[/sine][/purple].
WARFRAMEMOD-RIVEN_MAKER.pages.INITIAL.op: Pay [red]{PriceOfOneRiven}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Riven[/gold] with random attributes into your [gold]Deck[/gold].
Pay [red]{PriceOfTwoRivens}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Rivens[/gold] with random attributes into your [gold]Deck[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-RIVEN_MAKER.pages.IF_CYCLE.d: [sine]"...Do you want to [red]Cycle[/red] the [gold]Riven[/gold]? No cost too great, no blood too precious..."[/sine]
You bid farewell to this mysterious woman with your brand new [gold]Riven[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-RIVEN_MAKER.pages.ALL.option: Lose [red]{Damage}[/red] HP. Select a [gold]Riven[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold], regenerate the attributes of it.
You are satisfied with the attribute of your [gold]Riven[/gold].
Discard the [gold]Riven[/gold] attributes generated in this cycle.
WARFRAMEMOD-SANCTUARY_OF_SIMARIS.title: The Sanctuary of Simaris
WARFRAMEMOD-SANCTUARY_OF_SIMARIS.pages.I:
[gold]A strange shape composed of yellow light[/gold] suddenly appears in front of you.
[jitter]"I am Cephalon Simaris. The destroyer. The immortalizer. This is my [gold]Sanctuary[/gold]. It will enlighten you, should you assist me in performing [gold]Synthesis[/gold]. You will hunt the creatures I require and transform them into beings of the [gold]Sanctuary[/gold]. That is [gold]Synthesis[/gold]. Is this murder? No. All beings of substance die eventually. But only those forgotten are truly dead."[/jitter]
If you don't accept it, its incessant chatter seems to never stop.
WARFRAMEMOD-SANCTUARY_OF_SIMARIS.pages.S: [jitter]"Good. Even while others are blinded by petty morality, you recognized the virtue of the [gold]Sanctuary[/gold]."[/jitter]
WARFRAMEMOD-SANCTUARY_OF_SIMARIS.loss: "The Sanctuary will go on without you, but can you go on without the Sanctuary?"
